creator: kimelto@gmail.com
text:
On 03/11/2011 15:21, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of irc/ii,
>
> Please note that PR ports/155473 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/155473
>    
I approve the update to 1.6 but would like to stay the maintainer.
